text: Here, amidst glass and mirrors, my reflection is multiplied and distorted. The vacant chairs signal an anticipation of discourse—a philosophical tension between presence and absence. Then, I arrive at a vibrant wall—R + D—words and screens illuminating human curiosity. I feel a surge of wonder at our ongoing quest to understand and innovate, and a sense of quiet solitude as I observe these spaces, aware that I am both participant and witness in humanity’s relentless exploration of meaning.
